s: In 1995, Melvin Bunch suited up for KCR as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 5.620, WHIP 1.400, SO 19, WAR -0.400.
Changed teams after the previous season (KCR -> SEA).
In 1999, Melvin Bunch suited up for SEA as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 11.700, WHIP 2.700, SO 4, WAR -0.300. Notable context: Joined SEA.
